source_papers.title: Exploring the Therapeutic Potential of Focal Adhesion Kinase Inhibition in Overcoming Chemoresistance in Pancreatic Ductal Adenocarcinoma
Combined machine learning models, docking analysis, ADMET studies and molecular dynamics simulations for the design of novel FAK inhibitors against glioblastoma
Focal adhesion kinase priming in pancreatic cancer, altering biomechanics to improve chemotherapy

scoring.formula: score = min((log(ab+1) + log(bc+1)) * novelty / 10, 1.0); novelty = 1.0 if direct==0 else 0.7 / (direct+1)
